title: Run final build:all and verify all outputs
description: After all build/dependency changes, run: `bun install`, `bun run clean`, `bun run build:all`, `bun x tsc --noEmit`, `bun test`. Confirm: (1) build succeeds for index.cjs, stdio-server.mjs, http-server.mjs; (2) all 3 dist files exist and are smaller; (3) typecheck passes (or has no NEW errors beyond pre-existing); (4) tests pass.
validation: All 4 commands succeed. Document the before/after dist/ sizes in task output.
